title: Safe Haven Repair Station
description:
Lantimorne used to be the city of the future. Now it lies desolate and half-deserted beside a cursed ocean, in the shadow of a looming prophecy. In eleven years, Lantimorne will fall. The few people who linger within its walls are desperate, opportunistic, or just have nowhere else to go - but all of them have a story to tell.

Safe Haven Repair Station is a first-person puzzle RPG with around an hour of playtime. Every day, meet new clients and keep their items in tip-top shape. Puzzle gameplay is low-stress and thoughtful - take as long as you need to get the job done. Savour conversations with Lantimorne's residents or keep your head down to the workbench.

MASTER THE TOOLS OF BENTHOKINESIS

The benthic water that whispers of Lantimorne’s ruin is also its lifeblood. Learn to manipulate it through thoughtful 3D puzzle gameplay to get the most out of every repair. Just be careful - you don’t want to end up with the bends…

CHANGE THE LIVES OF YOUR CUSTOMERS

The decisions you make have consequences far beyond your workbench. Help your clients prepare for challenges, make difficult decisions, and reach their goals - or don’t. Every puzzle has two possible solutions, and each one opens up new story possibilities. Uncover them all over the course of multiple playthroughs.

 

MANAGE YOUR REPAIR SHOP

Lantimorne is not always a friendly place, but customers know that your shop - in the back of a foreclosed subway station - is a safe haven. Your surroundings are cozy, warm, and packed with hand-placed details. Tune in to the radio to find your favourite station and hear twelve unique tracks composed in-house, the perfect accompaniment to your work.

 

UNCOVER THE MYSTERIES OF A DOOMED CITY

As a native of Lantimorne, you have grown up amid its decay. But the people around you are still full of secrets waiting to be uncovered, and so is your trusty radio, your connection to the city outside your booth. Stay tuned to the broadcasts and pick up what you can from your conversations - every element is packed with interconnected detail waiting to be explored. Over three days of gameplay, feel Lantimorne breathe and change around you.

HANDCRAFTED FLAIR

Every aspect of Lantimorne and its people is built with love, without the use of generative AI in any form. Faithful attention to detail brings PSX-style graphics to life.
description_short: Make a new start in a dying city. Repair arcane cyberpunk items, befriend odd and intriguing characters, and make choices to shape the world around you, all from the warmth of your workbench.
